name: constant_zero_returns
description: All historical returns are exactly 0.0 across all tickers. spy_today_return=0.0. current_symphony_return = 0. Distribution is degenerate (all zeros) so searchsorted returns the full length when value equals all elements (left-insertion semantics) — pin captures present behavior.
derivation: Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD c3834d0 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42). num_days raised from 30 to 50: under Ruling 2 (AC-4 eligible-pool sufficiency) a 30-day raw history is eligible-insufficient (11 eligible < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS); 50 raw days keeps this fixture on the real MC path it exercises (the constant-zero degenerate distribution). All sim_results are 0.0; current_symphony_return = 0.0 (last_percent_change=0.0); searchsorted 'left' on sorted-zeros for value 0.0 returns 0; below_count=0; prob = ((5000 - 0) / 5000) * 100.0 = 100.0. Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer.
